view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for the selector mode for `resource_type` is satisfied as evidenced by the successful creation of an offer component with the appropriate selector.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for the selector mode for `resource_type` is satisfied as evidenced by the successful creation of an offer component with the appropriate selector.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement by confirming that the offer component 'Instructor' was created with the selector set to `resource_type=host`. This aligns with the stated need for broad matching by supply class, as described in the linked use case. The evidence from the prior steps supports that the necessary components and configurations were established to meet this requirement.
